completed_tasks.name: Tranche 1 — gitignore audit, ROADMAP dedupe, archive done phases/quicks, fix stale CLAUDE.md hook ref
Tranche 2 — consolidate user_data/ and cv-templates/ into backend/

remaining_tasks.name: Tranche 3 — frontend/src/features/direct-edit/components/ regroup
remaining_tasks.scope: 25+ flat files into subfolders: change-review/ (ChangeCard/List/Panel/Popover/Highlight/GapPromptChips), tune-tiers/ (Tier1/2/3, TunePanel), editor-primitives/ (Editable*, Section/EntryWrapper, FloatingFormatToolbar, GripIcon, DropLine), dialogs/ (Confirm, NamePrompt, SaveCV)
remaining_tasks.risk: many import path updates; use git mv to preserve history; run tests + tsc after each subfolder

remaining_tasks.name: Tranche 4 — backend/services/ regroup
remaining_tasks.scope: subfolders: storage/ (storage.py, file_storage, dynamo_storage, storage_factory, version_service), voice/ (voice_*), ai/ (bedrock, llm_cache). Keep latex_compiler.py at top level. cv_extractor/ already grouped.
remaining_tasks.risk: import path churn across routes/; backend test suite must pass

remaining_tasks.name: Tranche 5 — frontend/src/hooks/ feature-coupling
remaining_tasks.scope: Move feature-coupled hooks (useTailor, useImport, useChat, useVoiceInterview) into respective features. Keep useCompiler/useTemplates as shared in /hooks/.
remaining_tasks.risk: feature import boundaries; verify no cross-feature leakage after move

blockers.description: 16 template-rendering tests fail with 'No filter named html_latex' — pre-existing on stash baseline, not caused by tranche 2. Phase 13 in-flight work.
blockers.workaround: Ignore for hygiene work. Verify counts stay at 16/349 after each tranche.

human_actions_pending.action: Docker volume migration on existing deployments
human_actions_pending.context: Tranche 2 moved cv-maker-data mount target from /app/user_data to /app/backend/user_data. Documented in .planning/quick/260524-ws1-*/260524-ws1-SUMMARY.md. Local dev unaffected.

decisions.decision: Full move accepting breaking deployment change
decisions.rationale: User chose 'Full move, accept breaking' over symlink/compat-shim. Single atomic commit per tranche, no half-states.
User picked option 3: live alongside the code that owns it. backend/user_data/voice_profile.json was already stranded there.
Co-locate raw LaTeX cls/sty/font assets with the Jinja2 .tex.j2 templates that consume them. Dropped redundant Dockerfile COPY since backend/ already covers it.

decisions.decision: Plain mv for untracked content, git mv for tracked
decisions.rationale: git mv refused on empty/gitignored dirs (user_data/versions/* contents are gitignored runtime data). cv-templates/ tracked → git mv preserved cls/sty/tex/font/png history.
User explicit ask: '/gsd-quick per tranche'. Keep refactor steps reviewable as discrete units.
User chose 'Keep, leave alone' — graph viewer artifacts are useful, gitignored already.

next_action: Start tranche 3: /gsd-quick "Repo hygiene tranche 3 of 5: frontend/src/features/direct-edit/components/ regroup. ~25 flat files → subfolders change-review/, tune-tiers/, editor-primitives/, dialogs/. Use git mv to preserve history. Update all import paths. Run cd frontend && npm run typecheck && npm test after each subfolder. Single atomic commit."
context_notes: Two of five tranches landed cleanly. Remaining three are import-path-heavy refactors; each needs a fresh context budget because of the import update fan-out. Tranches 3 and 5 are frontend (need typecheck + vitest). Tranche 4 is backend (needs pytest -x --ignore=tests/slow). Pre-existing test failures (16 template-rendering, html_latex filter missing) must NOT be attributed to tranche work — verify baseline count before each commit.
